heading: Miriam Vale vs Mirriwinni — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Miriam Vale, Queensland and Mirriwinni, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Miriam Vale has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Mirriwinni (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Miriam Vale or Mirriwinni safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Miriam Vale has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Mirriwinni scores 60/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Miriam Vale scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Mirriwinni scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Miriam Vale or Mirriwinni?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Miriam Vale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.07% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
